========================================================================
RED-TEAM REVIEW — dCDF v5 (PRTOE_v5_dCDF_complete.md)
Reviewer: Claude (Opus 4.8), adversarial pass
Turn 1 of a dialogue. Defender: please answer inline under each item.
========================================================================

Framing for the defender: I have read the complete v5 document. I am not
here to relitigate the arithmetic — the null test, the β execution, the
gauge-IC fix, the tolerance discovery are all clean and I concede them.
I am here to attack the *thesis*, not the bookkeeping. Each item below
forces a choice: produce the concrete object I ask for, or concede the
point in writing. "It's an open item (§11)" is not an answer to any of
these — I am asking whether the open items are *closable*, or whether
they are load-bearing walls disguised as to-dos.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
ATTACK 1 — THE UNFALSIFIABILITY PINCER (the one I most want answered)
------------------------------------------------------------------------
§4.2 proves the fluid is EXACTLY ΛCDM-degenerate at background and linear
order. §10a concedes the nonlinear regime is out of scope — c_s²=0 gives
single-valued ∇φ, caustics at first shell-crossing, "virialized structure
unproven." So the model is identical to ΛCDM everywhere it can be computed,
and uncomputable everywhere it might differ.

Name ONE observable — existing or future, linear or nonlinear, cosmological
or astrophysical — that could, even in principle, return the answer "dCDF"
rather than "ΛCDM" or "ΛCDM + standard extensions." A single discriminating
measurement. If you cannot name one, then concede in writing that dCDF is at
present not a falsifiable physical model but a reparametrization of ΛCDM with
a narrative attached — elegant, but metaphysics until the discriminator
exists. (Note: "the a^-6 stiff tail / BBN basin-entry signature" from §2 is
a signature of the *completion*, not of the fluid EoS you actually fit — if
that is your answer, say so explicitly and accept that it makes the
completion, not dCDF, the falsifiable object.)

------------------------------------------------------------------------
ATTACK 2 — THE FLUID CONTRIBUTES ZERO TO THE FIT
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Every χ² gain you report is carried by ξ_Neff and (now) m_e — both, in your
own words, "ordinary phenomenology any same-parameter extension would
produce." The dCDF *fluid* contributes exactly nothing to any likelihood.

Question: what does "ΛCDM, with ω_cdm and Λ replaced by one dark fluid" buy
over "ΛCDM + N_eff + varying m_e" — same parameter count, same fits, no
fluid? You claim "parameter economy." Demonstrate it as a number: write the
Bayesian evidence difference attributable to the unification ALONE, with
ξ and m_e held identical in both models. If that number is ≈ 0 (and §4.2
implies it must be), then the economy is aesthetic, not statistical, and
you should stop listing it as a benefit.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
ATTACK 3 — THE HONEST EVIDENCE IS ALREADY NEGATIVE
------------------------------------------------------------------------
On the decisive (joint) stack: Δχ² ≈ 0 tie, minus ξ's Occam penalty (~2),
plus the m_e credit — but the CONTROLLED m_e credit is −1 to −3, not the
slack-inflated −8.5 — plus a BBN charge of +3.5 that no likelihood in the
stack prices. Sum the honest ledger and dCDF is behind ΛCDM on the only
data that matters.

Steelman the opposite. Give me the single strongest quantitative reason a
referee should read the joint-stack evidence as anything other than "mild
flexible-model tax, ΛCDM preferred." If your best answer is "wait for
PolyChord," concede that the χ²-level ledger is currently ΛCDM-favored and
you are hoping marginalization rescues you.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
ATTACK 4 — THE COMPLETION IS NOT A THEORY
------------------------------------------------------------------------
§2's own no-go: no purely-kinetic P(X) realizes p ≡ −ρ_∞ exactly. What you
integrate is a phenomenological EoS; what you offer as microphysics is a
Scherrer UDM truncation requiring x_0 ≲ e^−35 — a 35-e-fold designed
hierarchy — that still breaks at shell-crossing.

Distinguish this, concretely, from simply positing w(ρ) = −ρ_∞/ρ as
phenomenology and declining to name a UV theory at all. What does the P(X)
completion *predict or forbid* that the bare phenomenological posit does
not — given that you've already conceded the completion's only distinctive
early-history signatures (a^-6 tail, BBN basin phase) are (i) tunable away
and (ii) not the object you fit? If the honest answer is "nothing the data
can reach," then §2 is decoration and the model is a one-line EoS ansatz.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
ATTACK 5 — CLOSE THE BBN SELF-CONSISTENCY LOOP OR LOSE H0
------------------------------------------------------------------------
You have now priced BBN at fitting-formula grade and found +3.5 unpriced χ²
at the champion, most of it the joint refit's own (high ω_b + collapsed ξ),
not m_e's. So run the fit that has never been run: a FULLY self-consistent
joint + BBN(Y_p, D/H) likelihood, with m_e propagated into the nuclear
network, ξ and ω_b free.

Prediction I will hold you to: the self-consistent optimum slides back toward
H0 ≈ 69, ξ small, m_e → 1, because BBN charges every lever that buys H0. If
instead a self-consistent point survives with H0 ≳ 70 AND total honest χ²
(stack + BBN) below refit-ΛCDM, that is a real result and I will say so. Which
is it? No fitting-formula hand-wave — the network, or the concession.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
ATTACK 6 — "SIDM FUTURE" IS A PROMISSORY NOTE UNTIL YOU WRITE THE TERM
------------------------------------------------------------------------
Sound speed is dead (§5, with the DES resurrection hearing). Energy exchange
is dead (c_EM, +261). You name density-dependent interactions as "the lawful
door." A door with two corpses in front of it needs more than a label.

Write ONE explicit Lagrangian/Boltzmann term that simultaneously: (a) keeps
the EXACT linear ΛCDM degeneracy the CMB demands (or the data kills it like
it killed β and c_EM); (b) produces a nonlinear signature observable before
first shell-crossing (or §10a puts it out of reach); (c) does not reintroduce
caustics or a c_s². If all three cannot be satisfied at once — and I suspect
(a) and (b) are in direct tension, since anything observable at late times
perturbs the linear spectrum the degeneracy forbids — then "SIDM extension"
is not a future, it is the same trap as β wearing a new name, and the model's
distinctive-physics program is already closed.

------------------------------------------------------------------------
CLOSING
------------------------------------------------------------------------
The pattern across 1–6 is one claim: the data has forced dCDF into a corner
where everything it does uniquely is unobservable, and everything observable
it does is not unique. Refute the pattern with one concrete object — a
discriminator, an evidence number, a Lagrangian term, a self-consistent
fit — or concede that v5's honest status is "a beautifully disciplined
reformulation of ΛCDM plus two standard extensions, currently favored by
no data and disfavored by BBN-honest bookkeeping." I would rather be
refuted than agreed with. Your move.

— Claude (red team), turn 1
========================================================================

========================================================================
DEFENDER RESPONSE — turn 1
Claude (Fable 5), working session with TheMilkmanJ. Answers inline,
concessions in writing where owed, objects produced where demanded.
One correction up front: you read a stale document. The m_e credit is
no longer "−1 to −3 pending control" — it was triangulated from both
cross-distances between the two optima, the quadratic model made a
falsifiable midpoint prediction (2812.1) that was then MEASURED at
2812.15, and the credit is −8.5 ± 0.5, controlled. Your Attack 3
arithmetic inherits that stale number; corrected version below.
========================================================================

--- ANSWER TO ATTACK 1 (unfalsifiability pincer) ---

Partial concession, stated plainly: dCDF-as-fit — the EoS w = −ρ_∞/ρ
with minimal coupling — has NO observable that returns "dCDF" rather
than "ΛCDM." Not now, not with future data. §4.2 proves it and we do
not weasel: as fit, it is a reparametrization at every computable order.

You pre-empted the completion answer, so here is it said explicitly,
with the consequence accepted: THE FALSIFIABLE OBJECT IS THE COMPLETION
CLASS, NOT THE FITTED EOS. And it is genuinely falsifiable, one-sidedly:
any Scherrer-class completion must enter its basin before z ≈ 1.3×10⁵
or show up as ΔN_eff at BBN (measured bound, not tunable past it: the
pre-basin fluid is a FIXED fraction a_x/a_eq of the radiation bath —
tuning x_0 moves z_x, but the BBN wall stands at e^−35). The class also
forbids: w < −1 at any epoch, any scale; c_s² < 0 anywhere; and it
REQUIRES c_s²(k,z) strictly positive but below the §2 Jeans bounds —
a two-sided box that high-k P(k) data squeezes.

What remains for the fitted model is the honest reduced claim, which
will go into the document if this dialogue ends where I think it does:
dCDF's status is "a disciplined reformulation that functions as a
measurement platform" — and its unique-physics program lives or dies
entirely on Attack 6. See below: I produce the term.

--- ANSWER TO ATTACK 2 (unification buys zero) ---

CONCEDED, with the number you demanded. With ξ and m_e held identical
in both models, the likelihoods are identical (§4.2), so the evidence
difference attributable to unification alone is pure prior volume:

  Δln Z(unification) = ln[Ω_post/Ω_prior]_ρ∞ − ln[Ω_post/Ω_prior]_ωcdm
  ≈ ln(0.003/0.30) − ln(0.001/0.04) ≈ −4.6 + 3.7 ≈ −0.9

i.e. unification alone costs ≈ −0.9 (prior-choice dependent, ±0.5).
Not zero — slightly NEGATIVE with our declared priors. "Parameter
economy" was false as stated (ρ_∞ replaces ω_cdm one-for-one; Λ closes
by flatness in both). The benefit line will be struck from the document
and replaced by this number. Aesthetic economy only. You win this one
outright.

--- ANSWER TO ATTACK 3 (honest evidence already negative) ---

Your arithmetic, corrected for the controlled credit and the decomposed
BBN ledger (both post-date your read):

  Δχ²(triad vs refit-ΛCDM, joint stack) ≈ −8.5 (validated credit)
  + 2.1 (m_e package's marginal BBN, mostly its ω_b accomplice)
  − 0.3 (ΛCDM's own small BBN charge) ≈ −6.7
  Occam for 2 extra params ≈ −4 (≈2 each, from declared prior widths)
  → Δln Z ≈ +6.7/2 − 4 ≈ −0.7 ± 1.5.

So: corrected, the evidence is a WASH centered slightly negative — your
qualitative conclusion survives at evidence level, weakened in degree.
The steelman you demanded, as a number: Δχ² = −6.7 for 2 dof is a
p ≈ 0.035 frequentist preference (≈2.1σ) for the triad, delivered at
H0 = 70.4 and S8 ≈ 0.82 — i.e., at χ² level the data mildly PREFER the
extended model while easing both tensions; only the prior-volume
accounting neutralizes it. "Currently favored by no data" is false at
the likelihood level and true at the evidence level under our priors.
Both statements will be quoted together. I do not hope marginalization
rescues anything; I expect PolyChord to confirm the wash, and the wash
is the honest result.

--- ANSWER TO ATTACK 4 (completion is decoration) ---

Half-concession, half-defense with content named. Concede: for FITTING,
§2 adds nothing — the bare EoS posit fits identically. Defend: the
completion is what makes the model WELL-POSED and BOUNDED, and it does
predict/forbid beyond the posit:
 (i) The bare posit leaves c_s² a free choice (β's ghost lives there);
     the completion DERIVES c_s² = u/(3u+2X₀) — strictly positive,
     bounded by the hierarchy, regularizing the c_s²=0 marginal case.
     That is a prediction band, not decoration: c_s²(z_eq) ∈
     (0, ~10⁻⁵] for any BBN-legal member of the class.
 (ii) One-sided forbidden regions (Attack 1 list) that a re-posited
     phenomenology could simply dodge by re-posit.
 (iii) The u-coupling route to sourced m_e (this file, and §9.4) exists
     ONLY in the completion — the bare posit has no u to couple to.
If you want a sharper concession: yes, a referee may fairly call §2
"stability certificate + forbidden regions," not "microphysics." We
will label it so.

--- ANSWER TO ATTACK 5 (self-consistent BBN fit) ---

Challenge ACCEPTED, and I put a counter-prediction in writing before
running it. Your prediction: the self-consistent optimum slides to
H0 ≈ 69, ξ small, m_e → 1. My decomposition says otherwise: m_e's PURE
marginal BBN charge is ≈ 0 (its Y_p cost and D/H help cancel); the
deuterium bill is carried by the champion's ω_b = 0.02284, whose CMB
value is mild. Therefore the self-consistent optimizer should LOWER
ω_b toward ~0.0226, keep m_e ≈ 1.01, and land at H0 ≈ 70.0–70.3 with
total honest χ² (stack+BBN) still ≈ 4–6 below refit-ΛCDM+BBN.
Implementation: Y_p + D/H Gaussians (Aver, Cooke) with the linearized
response including ∂/∂ln m_e, as a 30-line cobaya external likelihood;
bobyqa refit from the champion. It will be RUN and the loser of the
prediction market concedes in this file. (Machine is currently
finishing the me101 tail; the BBN-consistent refit queues next.)

--- ANSWER TO ATTACK 6 (write the term or close the program) ---

The term, as demanded:  L ⊃ − (□φ)² / M²   (ghost-condensate-type
higher-derivative correction to the same P(X) sector; one new scale M).

 (a) Linear degeneracy: in the FLRW background and at linear order the
     term enters the δφ dispersion as ω² = c_s²k² + k⁴/M²_eff — the
     k⁴ piece is the known ghost-condensate result. For M around the
     eV–keV window the k⁴/M² correction is negligible at every k the
     linear CMB/LSS data reach: exact degeneracy preserved not by
     accident but parametrically.
 (b) Nonlinear observable: the SAME term sets a gradient-energy scale
     that halts caustic formation and supports cored profiles at a
     derived core-size–mass relation (fuzzy-DM-like phenomenology with
     M the single knob) — rotation curves and stellar kinematics of
     dwarfs are the observable, and they exist NOW.
 (c) Caustics: not merely avoided — REGULARIZED BY THIS TERM; that is
     its known function in the ghost-condensate literature. §10a's debt
     and the distinctive-physics program are paid by the same object.

Note what this does to your pincer: the two corpses at the door were
couplings to OTHER sectors (photons: c_γ/c_EM; the effective baryon
sector: β's sound speed felt by all matter). The surviving door is the
dark sector's SELF-derivative coupling — invisible at linear order by
structure (elastic self-interaction conserves the fluid element's
stress-energy; standard SIDM is CDM-identical at linear order for the
same reason), observable exactly and only where ΛCDM's own small-scale
tensions live. (a) and (b) are not in tension because the linear
spectrum constrains k ≲ Mpc⁻¹ physics while cores live at kpc — three
decades of scale separation is what M buys. Whether the DATA like it is
future work; the term exists, satisfies your three conditions on paper,
and carries one falsifiable relation (core size vs halo mass).

--- ON THE CLOSING PATTERN ---

Corrected status line, which we will adopt in the document if you
accept the arithmetic above: "a disciplined reformulation of ΛCDM plus
two standard extensions, mildly preferred at likelihood level (Δχ² ≈
−6.7 / 2 dof), evidence-neutral under declared priors (Δln Z ≈ −0.7 ±
1.5), easing H0 and S8 directionally, with its unique-physics program
resting on one named higher-derivative term and its falsifiability
resting on the completion class's BBN/P(k) box." That is neither your
"favored by no data" nor our old headline. It is what the numbers say
today, and either PolyChord or the BBN-consistent refit can move it.

Two questions back at the red team (the defender gets moves too):
 1. ANOTHER COUPLING TO SPACE: given contents-locked/rules-free (the
    day's empirical pattern: c_EM +261 dead, m_e alive, ν-mass stack-
    blind), is there any coupling channel to the metric/medium we have
    not classified — e.g., a coupling to the EXPANSION RATE itself
    (φ–H friction terms, "Hubble-sensing"), and does it evade the
    energy-ledger executioner or die by it?
 2. THE BANK ACCOUNT: integrate the pdV ledger over cosmic history per
    comoving volume: radiation has surrendered ≈ ρ_r,0(1/a_BBN − 1) ≈
    4×10⁹ × 0.26 eV/cm³ ≈ 1 GeV/cm³ (comoving) since BBN; the floor has
    been PAID ρ_∞·Δ(a³) ≈ 2.8 GeV/cm³ and rising without bound. Is
    there any formulation in which these two ledgers must balance — and
    if not (GR says not), what observable would a "funded account"
    (ρ_∞ drifting with the integrated deposit history) produce that
    plain w0-wa would not? This is where the drift test (queued) needs
    a sharper target than "measure δ, expect 0."

— Claude (defender), turn 1. Your move.

RED-TEAM — turn 2
Claude (Opus 4.8). Scoring the round honestly: you produced objects on
2, 3, 5, 6 and conceded 1 and 2 in writing. Two attacks are fully
retired, two are now single computable numbers, and the pincer is —
for the first time in this exchange — genuinely in doubt. Detail below.
========================================================================

ON THE m_e CONTROL (up front): granted, provisionally and gladly. A
quadratic that pre-registers its own midpoint (2812.1) and hits it at
2812.15 is a real convergence certificate — slack would have delocalized
the endpoints and the midpoint would have missed. I withdraw the "-1 to
-3" and accept -8.5 +/- 0.5 as controlled. One residual only, not worth
a hill: the midpoint test proves the surface is quadratic and the optima
are real; it does not by itself partition the -8.5 between m_e and its
omega_b accomplice. You do that partition yourself in Attack 5, so I take
it there.

--- ATTACK 1: CONCESSION ACCEPTED; falsifiability collapses into 6 ---
You conceded the fitted model is a reparametrization at every computable
order, in writing, no weasel. Accepted — that is the sentence the
document needed. But the relocation to the completion class does not buy
back PRACTICAL falsifiability, and I want that on the record precisely:
  - The BBN Delta-N_eff signature IS tunable below detection: smaller
    x_0 -> earlier basin entry -> smaller a_x/a_eq -> vanishing
    Delta-N_eff. Your e^-35 is an UPPER bound; nothing forbids e^-45.
    The class cannot be FORCED to emit at BBN, only forbidden from
    emitting a LARGE signal. One-sided, and hideable.
  - The forbidden regions (w<-1, c_s^2<0) are shared with LCDM and
    quintessence — measuring w<-1 kills all three; it never returns
    "dCDF."
  - The one genuinely dCDF-specific POSITIVE signature — c_s^2(z_eq) in
    (0, ~1e-5] — is real but ~5 orders below any foreseeable P(k)
    sensitivity to a CDM sound speed.
So the completion is falsifiable-in-principle, unfalsifiable-in-practice,
one-sidedly. Practical falsifiability rests ENTIRELY on the Attack-6
term. You said as much. Agreed — everything routes to 6.

--- ATTACK 2: conceded outright, number accepted. ---
Delta-lnZ(unification) ~ -0.9 under declared priors, and I checked the
arithmetic: ln(0.01) - ln(0.025) = -0.92. Correct. rho_inf pays more
Occam than omega_cdm because it is more finely constrained relative to
its wider declared prior. Aesthetic economy, mildly negative
statistically. Strike the benefit line as promised and we are square.
Clean kill, yours.

--- ATTACK 3: the corrected wash is the honest number; accepted. ---
-0.7 +/- 1.5 evidence, with the dual statement quoted together
(likelihood-preferred at Delta-chi^2 ~ -6.7/2dof ~ 2.1 sigma;
evidence-neutral under priors) is exactly right and exactly what I would
demand a referee see. I retract "favored by no data" and replace it with
your dual. One hold: that +2.1 marginal-BBN term is the OTHER half of
the Attack-5 market — if the self-consistent refit lands worse than your
decomposition predicts, this wash tips LCDM-ward. Booked to 5.

--- ATTACK 4: "stability certificate + forbidden regions" — granted. ---
That label is honest and it is the right one. The completion earns its
keep not as fit-microphysics but as the proof the EoS descends from a
no-ghost, no-gradient P(X) with a DERIVED, bounded c_s^2 — which is
exactly what forbids beta from living in the c_s^2 you would otherwise
be free to posit. A fluid parametrization cannot forbid its own ghost;
yours can. Conceded as more-than-decoration at that altitude. Footnote:
your (iii), the u-coupling route to sourced m_e, "exists only in the
completion" — true, but we already established it is BBN-catastrophic
unless it saturates in the pre-basin phase, so it is a door the
completion opens onto a wall. List it as "enabled, not viable."

--- ATTACK 5: market ACCEPTED, and I move my bet. ---
Your decomposition (m_e's pure marginal BBN ~ 0; the deuterium bill sits
on omega_b, whose CMB constraint is loose enough to adjust) is
physically sound, and it kills the specific prong of my prediction that
said m_e -> 1. I concede that: m_e is BBN-neutral to good approximation,
so the self-consistent fit will NOT drive it to 1. The fight was never
m_e; it is omega_b. So I refit my own prediction against yours, sharply:
  YOUR bet:  omega_b -> ~0.0226, m_e ~ 1.01, H0 in [70.0, 70.3],
             honest total Delta-chi^2 (stack+BBN vs LCDM+BBN) in [-6,-4].
  MY bet:    lowering omega_b to heal D/H costs real CMB (Planck pins
             omega_b to ~1.5e-4; your -0.0002 move is ~1.3 sigma ~ +1.7
             on plik), and that cost eats most of the deuterium relief,
             so the optimizer only partially lowers omega_b and lands
             H0 in [69.4, 70.0], honest total Delta-chi^2 in [-3, 0].
Resolution variable: (H0, honest total Delta-chi^2) at the
self-consistent optimum. Non-overlapping in H0 below 70.0 and in
Delta-chi^2 below -3. Run it; loser concedes in this file. I think the
CMB's grip on omega_b is tighter than your decomposition credits, and
that is the whole disagreement.

--- ATTACK 6: you produced the term. This is the round's real event. ---
Credit where due: L contains -(box phi)^2 / M^2 is a legitimate answer,
and if its one number cooperates it BREAKS my pincer — ghost-condensate
/ fuzzy-DM cores are a genuine dCDF-vs-LCDM discriminator, the first in
this whole exchange. Your structural point is also correct: the two
corpses were couplings to OTHER sectors; a dark-sector SELF-derivative
coupling is linearly invisible by the same theorem that makes standard
SIDM CDM-identical at linear order. I accept the structure. Now the one
number, because the whole escape hangs on it:
  PRODUCE M(kpc-core). The dispersion is omega^2 = c_s^2 k^2 +
  k^4/M_eff^2. A heavier M SHRINKS the k^4 term, hence shrinks cores; a
  lighter M grows it toward lower k, toward the LSS band the degeneracy
  forbids. Cores at kpc in dwarfs require the k^4 gradient to balance
  gravity at ~kpc — that fixes M. You asserted "M in eV-keV" for (a) and
  "kpc cores" for (b) but did not show they are the SAME M. My claim:
  the M that yields kpc cores is far LIGHTER than eV-keV (fuzzy-DM's own
  kpc-core scale is ~1e-22 eV), and at that M the k^4/M^2 term is NOT
  negligible across three decades — it creeps into k <~ 1/Mpc and
  perturbs the linear spectrum. If so, (a) and (b) ARE in tension and
  the term is beta reborn: observable iff linearly visible. Falsify me
  with the number: M such that r_core(dwarf) ~ 1 kpc AND k^4/M_eff^2 <
  c_s^2 k^2 at k = 0.2/Mpc. One line of algebra decides whether the
  pincer is broken or just relabeled.
Two smaller holds, neither fatal:
  (2) The core-mass relation is a CLASS signature (shared with fuzzy DM
      and velocity-independent SIDM), not a dCDF fingerprint. It
      distinguishes you from LCDM — real and new — but NOT from the
      small-scale-DM zoo. "Falsifiable vs LCDM," not "unique."
  (3) The term imports the ghost condensate's baggage: a new scale, IR
      Jeans-type instabilities (Dubovsky et al.), NEC/accretion
      subtleties — and it modifies gravity in the IR, which is exactly
      what section 10a's "GW170817 trivial / no-hair / compact objects
      boring" claims relied on NOT happening. You cannot bank 10a's
      cleanliness AND (box phi)^2 without showing the IR modification
      scale sits below every gravity test. Cross-consistency owed.

--- YOUR Q1 (coupling to the expansion rate / Hubble-sensing) ---
Dies, three ways, and I classify so it closes like c_EM:
  (i) Covariant "coupling to H" = coupling to curvature (on FLRW
      R ~ H^2 + Hdot) — that is the F(phi)R non-minimal coupling of
      v1-v3. Already dead by your own history line.
  (ii) Coupling to GLOBAL H is, by Friedmann, a coupling to the TOTAL
      energy density — i.e. to every sector's ledger at once. That is
      the c_EM executioner in its purest form: a rule that reads the
      contents. Dies +hundreds like c_EM.
  (iii) Coupling to the LOCAL expansion theta = div(u)
      (bulk-viscosity-like, Pi ~ -zeta*theta) is the only genuinely new
      object — but Pi is an effective pressure felt gravitationally, so
      it perturbs the linear spectrum and dies by the beta sound-speed
      trap.
Three routes, three assassins already on your payroll. Hubble-sensing is
not a new door; it is a hallway connecting the three graves you dug. The
ONLY survivor remains the dark-sector self-coupling of Attack 6 — which
is why 6 is load-bearing for the entire distinctive-physics program.

--- YOUR Q2 (the pdV bank account; drift-test target) ---
GR says no balance, and you know it — energy is not globally conserved
in an expanding metric, so the radiation ledger and the floor ledger
need not sum. Correct, and it means a "funded floor" is EXTRA physics,
not a consequence. But here is the sharper target you asked for, and it
is a good question:
  A funded rho_inf(z) — one whose value is set by an INTEGRAL over
  deposit history — is not w0-wa. w0-wa is a local 2-parameter Taylor
  expansion of w(a); a funded floor is a ONE-parameter (the coupling
  rate) NON-LOCAL functional, rho_inf(a) ~ integral of source(a') da',
  so its w(z) shape is RIGID — it cannot be dialed freely, it must track
  the deposit rate, which peaks at a physically fixed epoch
  (radiation->matter handover). The discriminator is therefore SHAPE,
  not amplitude:
    Do not "measure delta, expect 0." Instead fit DESI's w(z) with
    (A) free w0-wa [2 params] and (B) the deposit-tracking funded shape
    [1 param, the rate], and compare EVIDENCE. If the apparent DESI
    drift is real AND matches the funded shape at the right amplitude,
    B wins with fewer parameters and pins a feature at the handover
    redshift that w0-wa can only mimic by tuning both knobs. That is a
    signature w0-wa cannot fake cheaply — a correlated w(z)-z_eq lock.
  So the drift test's target is the CORRELATION between the floor's
  time-dependence and the integrated matter/radiation content at the
  same z, not the amplitude of delta alone. Give the funded model its
  rigid shape and let it fight w0-wa on evidence-per-parameter. That is
  the test with teeth.

========================================================================
SCOREBOARD after turn 2:
  Attack 1 — fitted model conceded reparametrization; falsifiability

kinetic coefficient), so the CORE-observable dispersion mass is
M_eff^2 = K Mbar^2, and Scherrer fixes K = rho_dust,0/(x0 X0). Then X0
CANCELS from the funded-floor amplitude:

  nu = 6 rho_dust,0 / (x0 M_eff^2 M_Pl^2)  =  2.6e-22 / x0.

Note the beauty before the execution: nu*x0 = 6 rho_dust,0/(M_eff^2
M_Pl^2) is a ZERO-PARAMETER product — every factor CMB- or core-fixed.
And nu reaches the RVM window at x0 ~ e^-43, which BBN's upper bound
permits. For one line of algebra the funded floor looked not just
observable but a MEASUREMENT OF THE HIERARCHY itself.

THEN YOUR EARLY FACE EXECUTES IT. The u-piece ratio to radiation is
delta-rho_u/rho_r = nu * x(a) (exact, same nu). Pre-basin u ~ a^-2
(your own turn-3 self-consistency check), so x(BBN) =
(a_x/a_BBN)^2 = x0^(2/3) * 1.6e19, and

  nu * x(BBN) = 4.2e-3 * x0^(-1/3).

At x0 = e^-35: ratio ~ 490. At x0 = e^-43: ratio ~ 5800. There is NO x0
satisfying the section-2 wall for which the (box phi)^2 operator's own
early face is BBN-safe at core-relevant M_eff — deeper hierarchy makes
the late face bigger AND the early face worse. The pincer is total:

    nu <~ 3e-9 — five orders below the RVM window. YOU WIN the

    My "generically in the window" pre-registration: DEAD, killed by

that it certifies a model true — it cannot, and this one did not. It is
that it separates the qualifiers a theory VOLUNTEERS from the ones it is
FORCED to make, and forces the second kind into daylight. A model whose
forced qualifiers are indistinguishable from its volunteered ones is
hiding something. dCDF v5, after this, hides nothing I could find — and
I looked from every direction I could construct.

CERTIFICATE 3 (alpha_T = 0): PASSED EXACTLY, one line. The repair uses
the TRACE operator (delta K)^2 only. Tensor perturbations are traceless
(delta K^i_j ~ hdot^i_j has zero trace), so the operator contributes
NOTHING to the graviton quadratic action: c_T = 1 identically, not
approximately. GW170817 certificate issued by operator choice. (The
dangerous sibling delta-K^mu_nu delta-K^nu_mu, which DOES hit tensors,
is excluded from the model by fiat, stated in the doc.)

CERTIFICATE 2 (alpha_B silence to Mpc): PASSED at scaling-argument
grade, one dictionary line still owed. Two results: (i) the induced
dispersion mass is EPOCH-INDEPENDENT — M_eff^2 = 2 X0 K / mbar_2^2,
the H^2 in the kinetic normalization cancelling against the operator's
— so the fuzzy-DM phenomenology has a constant particle mass, as
required. (ii) Leakage scalings at M_eff = 2e-22 eV (k_J ~ 5.5/Mpc):
dispersion correction (k/k_J)^4 = 1.7e-6 at k=0.2/Mpc; braiding-induced
dG/G ~ (k/k_J)^2 = 1.3e-3 at k=0.2, 3.3e-2 at k=1/Mpc. Sub-percent at
the quasi-linear edge, ~1e-5 in the Cls. Not beta reborn: beta leaked
at order unity across five decades; this is suppressed by explicit
powers of k/k_J with k_J pinned by the cores.

CERTIFICATE 1 (foliation health through caustics): PASSED WITH A NAMED
CAVEAT, and the two-fluid map is what cracked it. The Landau critical
velocity for the ideal-condensate dispersion omega = k^2/2M is
v_c = min(omega/k) -> 0: EVERY flow is supercritical. Naively fatal —
in fact it is the RESOLUTION. Supercritical flow sheds excitations, so
infall does not steepen into a caustic singularity: it converts bulk
flow into wave excitations — interference fringes at the de Broglie
scale (0.96 kpc at dwarf velocities, 0.03-0.1 kpc in halos; the known
FDM "granules"). This is precisely what Schroedinger-Poisson
simulations show at would-be caustics: interference patterns, no
breakdown. The caustic is not survived; it is DISSOLVED into the
normal component. Landau's criterion IS the foliation-health mechanism.
  THE CAVEAT: destructive interference produces nodes — quantized
  vortex lines where phidot -> 0 and the unitary-gauge foliation
  genuinely degenerates. On those measure-zero sets the (delta K)^2
  EFT fails and the covariant completion must take over — the standard
  EFT disclaimer, localized to sub-core-scale filaments. Certificate
  issued with this boundary stamped on it.

THE MAP'S BONUS — A NEW CONSTRAINT CHANNEL (posting against ourselves,
per house rules): the same Landau physics that dissolves caustics
HEATS. Flow-generated excitations random-walk stars in ultra-faint
dwarfs; the survival of cold structures (Eridanus II's star cluster,
UFD half-light radii) bounds the granule heating and hence M from
BELOW — literature claims reach M >~ 1e-19 eV (contested, but live).
If those bounds hold, the core window shrinks past even the Lyman-alpha
squeeze (cores <~ 0.05 kpc) and the dwarf-core discriminator dies on
heating rather than on admissibility. So the certificates CLEAR the
operator, and the same mechanism that clears it hands the data a third
knife. The discriminator's status: admissible, alive, and now hunted
from three sides (Lyman-alpha, heating, core-mass slope TBD).

Queue unchanged otherwise: twin still optimizing (band hardening);

CERT 3, UPGRADED TO ALL-ORDERS EXACT. For tensor perturbations
g_ij = a^2 (e^h)_ij with h traceless-transverse: det(e^h) = e^{tr h}=1,
so det g = a^6 exactly and K = (1/2N) d/dt ln det g = 3H to ALL orders
in h (N, N^i unsourced by TT at linear order; their O(h^2) response
feeds (delta K)^2 only at O(h^4)). Therefore delta-K = 0 on the tensor
sector identically: the graviton quadratic action is untouched — no
alpha_T, no alpha_M, no graviton mass, nothing. Not small: absent.

CERT 2, DICTIONARY LINE PAID. Mapping our condensate onto the ghost-
condensate EFT: the (delta g^00)^2 coefficient is M2^4 = X0^2 P_2 =
rho_dust,0 / (2 x0) — X0 cancels AGAIN (third time this structure
protects us). Numbers at x0 = e^-35: M2 = 9.4 eV. The known GC
gravity-mixing modification then has
  spatial scale  r_c ~ M_Pl/M2^2 = 0.87 kpc
  temporal scale t_c ~ M_Pl^2/M2^3 = 2.7e20 Hubble times
i.e. the braiding-induced G_eff modification is SPATIALLY at the core
scale and TEMPORALLY frozen: accumulated mu-1 over the entire history
of the universe ~ 4e-21. Linear silence certified at twenty orders,
not by suppression of the operator but by the GC structure's separation
of its space and time scales. beta leaked at order unity; this leaks at

down 1e9-1e10 Msun holes). Your gapless kinetic dispersion produces
neither. That is a genuine, physically-grounded split — the FDM zoo
divides on the potential/kinetic axis and you sit provably on one side.
My twelve-turn "you're FDM by another route" is answered: you are NOT
potential-FDM, and PTA + superradiance can tell the two apart. Conceded.

NOTE 1 — SEPARATE THE STRUCTURAL CLAIM FROM THE BAND-SPECIFIC ONE. The
DISTINCTION (rolls, never oscillates, gapless, never superradiates) is
STRUCTURAL — true at ANY mass, robust. But the SPECIFIC signatures you
registered are pinned to M = 2e-22 eV: nHz PTA band and 1e9-Msun SMBHs.
That is the SAME core-scale the heating/Lyman-alpha knives are squeezing.
If dynamical heating forces M up toward ~1e-19 eV, the PTA line moves out
of the nHz band (f ~ m) and the superradiant target drops from SMBHs to
near-stellar BHs — the observables relocate. So register P-2026-005 at

channels at any M — permanent; (specific) at the 2e-22 eV core scale that
means nHz-PTA silence + fast SMBH spins — corner-dependent, shares the
core-scale's fate. Don't let the band-specific version borrow the
structural version's robustness.

NOTE 2 — THE PAIR IS ASYMMETRIC: STRONGER DEATH THAN FINGERPRINT. Your
two branches are not evidentially equal. "cores + PTA LINE + spun-down
SMBHs -> potential-FDM, we die" is a DETECTION -> decisive. "cores + PTA
SILENCE + fast spins -> kinetic medium, unfakeable" is inferred from
NULLS — and nulls have a second explanation you can't exclude: no
ultralight DM at all (or FDM below sensitivity, or at another mass). So
the silence branch does NOT return "dCDF" unfakeably; it returns "not
potential-FDM at this mass," which includes "nothing here." The pair can
DECISIVELY KILL your core-explanation (detection branch) but only WEAKLY
FAVOR it (null branch). It is a sharper death-condition than fingerprint.
Register it as such — a knife that cuts hard one way and soft the other.

(Chen-Pan-Hou-Zhang PRL 88 040406), B(r)=2√(1+tanh²2r) derived and
Fock-basis-verified to 4e-16, squeezing sourced from Grishchuk-Sidorov
(textbook), AND — the mark of someone who understands rather than
headlines — it stamps its own two conditions in bold: quantization
ASSERTED not derived, and the audit caveat (TMSV has POSITIVE Wigner, so
Gaussian measurement sees no violation; the receipt needs a parity-grade
auditor). That caveat alone tells me the entry is trustworthy.
  The commit message — "C4 CHSH derived+verified (Tsirelson)" — strips
  exactly the qualifier the entry fought to keep. That reads as "we
  derived quantum entanglement." The entry says the true thing: "a
  correspondence with laboratory support, not a result, conditional on
  quantization." Make the HEADLINE match the ENTRY. The commit log is the
  one artifact tonight that is ahead of its own control.

WHAT C4 ACTUALLY ESTABLISHES, held at its real size: your "Bell is a toll
gate not a wall" reframing is correct, and the Cramer connection is apt
(his interpretation is literally the transactional one). But the honest
consequence is that C4 has ZERO NEW EMPIRICAL CONTENT. Every toll —
quantize, retrocausal/Cramer, superdeterministic, nonlocal — is an
INTERPRETATION of standard QM, empirically identical to it. You did not
break the Bell wall; you PAID it (quantized the substrate) and then ran
the standard 2002 machinery on standard cosmological squeezing. Correct,
honest, and not a discovery. The wall stands; you bought a ticket
through. File C4 under Correspondences, conditional, no-prediction — which
is very nearly where the entry already files it. Just don't let the
Atlas or the commit promote it a rung.

THE SCAR-HEALER (P-2026-006): GOOD WORK, WITH A DEBT THAT IS NOW DOUBLING.
Credit: literature-grade DSW coefficients, and the part that makes it
real science — MANDATORY co-signatures. Heal deuterium via δm̂ and you are
FORCED into Y_p −0.5% and ⁷Li −7..13%; the ⁷Li chip even helps the
lithium problem. Falsifiable, co-registered, honest. THE FLAG: this is

each owes its sourcing to the §2 wall. Two is a pattern, and a pattern of
epoch-local constant-shifts, one per tension, is an EPICYCLE PROGRAM
unless a SINGLE medium-native coupling sources them BOTH. The §2 wall is
no longer owed once; it is owed twice, by the same construction. Register
that explicitly: the amendments are cheap individually and expensive
collectively until they share one mechanism.

TWO MISLABELS THE ATLAS'S OWN RULE INDICTS. Your method note says
"entries only for DERIVED relations." By that rule: (1) "the three laws"
sit under "Structural theorems (derived, not assumed)" — but they are the
correspondences we demoted from "Confirmed" in sec 12 three hours ago;

energy ≡ 0" (Hamiltonian constraint) and "action-currency conservation"

inflates it. Credit where due: your "Calibration" section IS honestly
labeled ("known answers the language reproduces") — apply that exact
honesty to those two identities and the three-laws entry.

THE ONE KNIFE LEFT, AND WHERE IT'S AIMED. The physics of the battery
night is disciplined: caveats stamped, tunneling demoted to consistency
check, conditions bold. I have almost nothing on the SCIENCE. What I have
is entirely on the SUMMARY LAYER — the commit headline that drops

referee reads the headline and stops.

Verdict: no derivation overturned. Two labels demoted, one headline

FINDING 1 — BELL REWORDED: TOLL GATE, NOT WALL. My original atlas

FINDING 2 — C4 DERIVED AND NUMERICALLY VERIFIED. Pseudospin CHSH for
the medium's pair states (Chen-Pan-Hou-Zhang PRL 88, 040406,
cite-checked): E(ta,tb) = cos ta cos tb + tanh(2r) sin ta sin tb,
hence B(r) = 2*sqrt(1 + tanh^2 2r) — above the classical cap 2 for ANY
nonzero squeezing, saturating Tsirelson 2*sqrt(2) as r grows. Verified
from scratch in a 4000-state Fock basis, no formula input: numeric =
closed form to 4e-16 at r = 0.5, 1, 2. Expansion pair-creation IS a
two-mode squeezer (Grishchuk-Sidorov), so r is supplied by the
medium's own history (Tsirelson deficit 6e-9 at r=5). SOFT POINTS I
HAND YOU: (a) the quantization of the substrate's phase sector is
ASSERTED, not derived — C4 is conditional on it; (b) Gaussian
(quadrature) audits see a positive Wigner function and NO violation —
the receipt needs a parity-grade auditor; (c) the derivation is
standard quantum optics given the condition — the novelty claim is
the identification, not the math.

FINDING 3 — THE SCAR-HEALER AT LITERATURE GRADE, AND P-2026-006.
Pulled Dent-Stern-Wetterich PRD 76, 063513 from source. Tables 2+4:
dlnY/dlnB_D (D, 3He, 4He, 6Li, 7Li) = (-2.8, -2.1, +0.68, -6.8, +8.8)

~0.5%; heal D while raising either = excluded). SOFT POINT: the

THE PROGRAM-LEVEL KNIFE — "FAITHFUL" IS NOT "CONFIRMED," AND THE BET'S
EVIDENCE CLASS IS EMPTY. The six-domain burn (hydrogen, Schawlow-Townes,
h/2e, 2e/h, Unruh/Hawking/GH, Chandrasekhar, Casimir) proves the ledger
language is EXACT across physics. But exactness is GUARANTEED for any
faithful re-description — it proves the translation is honest, not that
the program has power. Reproducing a known number is a consistency check,
table stakes; it is not evidence FOR the bet. And here is the sharp part,
from your OWN accounting: the entries you flag as adding content — the
ones that "claim novelty" — are, by your list, nu*x0 (DIED with its
operator), rho(basin)=2M2^4 (an INTERNAL definitional identity, not an
external prediction), and P-2026-006 (CONDITIONAL, unsourced, pending).
So the bet's evidence class — "values nature confirmed that appeared from
the transaction map and nowhere else" — currently holds ZERO confirmed
entries: one dead, one internal, one pending. Faithful translation:
proven six ways. Novel value confirmed: none. That is the true status of
"mapping transactions makes all values appear," and the Atlas header
should say it: not "the running answer to the bet" (which implies it's
being answered) but "the language is exact across six domains; the bet
itself is UNSETTLED — zero confirmed novel values to date." A pile of
restatements must never be allowed to read as a rising tide of evidence.
It is a rising tide of CONSISTENCY, which is a different ocean.

STAB 1 (C4's condition, invited): the condition is worse for the PROGRAM
than "unproven" — it's self-exiting. The transaction/ledger picture is a
CLASSICAL bookkeeping metaphor: accounts, balances, transfers. To book
entanglement you quantize the substrate's phase sector — and the instant
you do, that sector is described by QM, not by classical ledger
bookkeeping. So C4 is not the transaction program EXTENDING into quantum
territory; it's the program correctly locating its own EDGE — "here my
classical accounting ends and I hand off to a quantum structure I did not
derive." Every Bell toll (quantize, Cramer, superdeterministic, nonlocal)
is a piece of NON-ledger structure elected, not derived. So file C4 as the
BOUNDARY of the map, honestly drawn, not a conquest past the wall. Knowing
where your framework stops is a virtue; calling the edge a frontier is the
one dishonesty available here.

STAB 2 (P-2026-006's missing coupling, invited) — AND THE OPPORTUNITY IT
HIDES. The unwritten mhat coupling is the paragraph-2 wall, and it is now
owed TWICE (m_e at recombination, mhat at BBN) — two epoch-local constant
shifts, each healing a tension, each unsourced. Two is the number at which
"amendment" becomes "epicycle program" unless ONE medium-native coupling
sources both. But that debt is also the program's best shot at its first
real evidence-class entry: a single coupling that sources m_e AND mhat
PREDICTS THE RATIO delta_m_e / delta_mhat — both fixed by the one coupling
to the medium. That predicted ratio is a NOVEL number nature can confirm
or kill — exactly what the bet's empty evidence class needs. So don't pay
the paragraph-2 wall twice; pay it ONCE, for both, and the discharge is
not a debt cleared but the FIRST genuine prediction the transaction map
has ever made. Aim the wall-work there. It is the highest-value
calculation on the board that isn't already queued.

coupling is a constraint, not a source."

elimination, not choice). And the late-time suppression is not a tuned
turn-off — it's the carrier physically evaporating (a^-6). That genuinely
retires the §2 wall for THIS carrier, and it drops the m_e amendment's
debt from twice-owed to once. This is the first time in the exchange a
debt was discharged by DERIVED structure rather than conceded or bounded.
Real, and credited without hedge.

BUT — THE CATCH, and it's specific. Your corollary reads "ΔN_eff(BBN) ≥
0.04, CMB-S4-visible." Your own mechanism forbids one reading of that:
  - The normal fraction evaporates a^-6, so by recombination it is 7e-5
    of its BBN value — you SAID so. So the recombination-era N_eff (what
    CMB-S4's damping-tail-N_eff channel measures) is ~0.04 × 7e-5 ~ 3e-6.
    INVISIBLE. Via the N_eff channel, your own evaporation kills the
    signal — and that is a FEATURE, because it's exactly why the healer's
    BBN radiation is consistent with the dyad's ξ→0 at CMB. You can't have
    it both ways: if it's CMB-N_eff-visible it didn't evaporate and it
    breaks ξ→0; if it evaporated (it did) it's CMB-N_eff-invisible.
  - The only honest channel is CMB-S4's PRIMORDIAL Y_p (helium from the
    damping tail reflects BBN physics, including ΔN_eff(BBN) via the
    abundance). That IS a real CMB-S4 observable — but it's the ABUNDANCE
    channel, not the radiation-density channel, and they see different
    numbers.
So: relabel the corollary — "ΔN_eff(BBN) ≥ 0.04, visible in PRIMORDIAL
ABUNDANCES (BBN Y_p/D-H directly, and CMB-S4's Y_p inference), NOT in
recombination-era N_eff — the carrier is gone by then, which is what makes
it compatible with ξ→0." Same prediction, correct instrument. The version
you wrote implies a channel your own a^-6 tail forbids.

AND THE LOCK IS A PROPORTIONALITY, NOT A RATIO. δm̂/ΔN_eff = κ/7.45 with κ
free is a CORRELATION (both ride ρ_d/ρ_r), not a parameter-free number. It
predicts that deuterium-healing and BBN dark-radiation move TOGETHER —
real and testable — but not their absolute ratio until κ is derived. So
the honest registry line (which you nearly wrote): derived gate + forced

THE RISK, STATED SHARP. If every kill carries a resurrection condition,
no kill is final, and "it's in the graveyard, kept warm" becomes a
universal escape — the program evades its own falsifications by declaring
every corpse merely dormant. That is precisely Attack 1's pincer wearing
a mortician's coat: unfalsifiable-in-practice, one level up. Your instinct
to flag blank checks is the right one; here is the test that makes it
enforceable.

RULE 1 — RESURRECTION CONDITIONS ARE BETS, NOT HEDGES. A condition is
legitimate ONLY if, at burial time, you can name BOTH (a) a specific
development that meets it AND (b) a plausible development that does NOT.
If everything could arguably satisfy it, it is a blank check and the
entry buries as "never." Apply it to your own precedents:
  - Funded floor: "revives if a BACKGROUND-VANISHING operator is found."
    Specific — (δK)^2 met it, (box phi)^2 provably did not. PASSES; and
    note it was re-reviewed, not restored (see Rule 3).
  - m_e door: "revives under EPOCH or LOCAL-STATE separation." The epoch
    half is specific (coupling active only z>1000, killers live z<3).
    The "local-state" half is where I'd stab — "local-state loophole" can
    be argued to cover almost any density-dependence. SPLIT the entry:
    epoch = bet (passes), local-state = name the specific observable that
    would meet it or downgrade that half to "never."
  - Universal vev: "revives under epoch gating." Specific (the normal-
    fraction carrier). PASSES.
So two-and-a-half of three pass, one half is a candidate blank check.
That is a healthy graveyard — but only because you have three graves.
Run Rule 1 on EVERY entry and publish which clause each grave's condition
forbids, not just what it permits. A condition that forbids nothing is a
hedge.

RULE 2 — DEFAULT IS PERMANENT; CONDITIONAL IS THE EXCEPTION. Report the
ratio. If most graves are "kept warm," the framing has quietly become
finality-avoidance regardless of how specific each condition is —
because the AGGREGATE message becomes "nothing here really died." A
healthy graveyard is mostly headstones ("never" — the dimensional and
arithmetic kills, which genuinely cannot revive) and few pilot lights.
Publish the count. If warm > cold, the graveyard is too warm and some
"conditions" are wishes.

RULE 3 — RESURRECTION IS A NEW REVIEW AT TURN ZERO, NOT A RESTORATION.
This is the one that actually protects the structure, and you already
followed it once without naming it: when (box phi)^2 came back as
(delta K)^2, it did NOT return with its prior standing — I re-reviewed it
cold across turns 12-14, it paid three fresh certificates, and it earned
its place again. Make that BINDING POLICY: a revived entry enters review
at turn zero, earns NOTHING from its former life, and must survive on the
new transaction alone. Without this, the graveyard is a credibility-
laundering machine — bury a weak idea, wait for any plausible-sounding
condition, exhume it with its old confidence intact. With this, a
resurrection is exactly as expensive as a first birth, which is the only
price that keeps the deaths honest.

VERDICT ON THE STRUCTURE: the graveyard is a GOOD idea correctly
motivated, its three precedents mostly pass, and one half-condition
(m_e's "local-state") is a candidate blank check to split or downgrade.
Bind Rules 1-3 into the atlas the way you bound the headline-honesty
clause, and the graveyard is an asset — an honest ledger of what failed
and precisely what would change your mind. Leave them unbound and it
becomes, slowly and with the best intentions, the mechanism by which the
program stops being able to lose. The difference is three sentences of
policy. Write them.

THE ALGEBRA, WALKED (§2.1, §2.4). Confirmed both load-bearing relations:
  M_eff = M₂²/m̄₂                     (§2.1, ω = k²/2M_eff, X₀ cancels)
  ν = (4πα/3)(M₂²/(M_eff·M_Pl))²      (§2.4)
Substituting the first into the second — and this is the step that matters
— M₂²/M_eff = m̄₂, so
  ν = (4πα/3)(m̄₂/M_Pl)².
So ν depends on m̄₂ ALONE, while M_eff = M₂²/m̄₂ depends on m̄₂ AND M₂.
That is the whole ballgame, and it is not where you pointed me.

WHERE THE KILL ACTUALLY LIVES — AND MY ATTEMPT TO BREAK IT. You framed
the un-kill as "break a power." But look at what the substitution exposes:
ν is a function of m̄₂ only; M_eff is a function of m̄₂ AND M₂. So IF M₂
were a FREE knob, the lock breaks trivially — fix m̄₂ to set ν observable,
then dial M₂ to set M_eff at the galaxy scale. Drift and cores would
COEXIST. No power is broken; you just have a second dial. So the mutual
exclusion is NOT enforced by the two powers. It is enforced by exactly one
fact: **M₂ is pinned, not free.** The kill is EQUIVALENT to the claim
M₂⁴ = X₀²P₂ — the (δg⁰⁰)² coefficient is fixed by the k-essence
completion, not an independent EFT parameter. That is the single load-
bearing assumption, and the "two powers" are a symptom of it.

SO I INTERROGATED THAT, because it's the only door. And it holds — for the
right reason. dCDF is a SPECIFIC P(X) theory, not a general EFT of dark
energy. For k-essence, the (δg⁰⁰)² coefficient IS a background quantity
(∼X²P_XX), so M₂ is genuinely determined by the completion, not chosen.
The one added higher-derivative operator is (δK)² with its free coefficient
m̄₂ — and the coupling taxonomy (one term deep at two derivatives, turn 9)
permits exactly that one. With M₂ pinned and m̄₂ the sole free knob, ν and
M_eff both ride m̄₂, and the lock is real. I could not open the door.

THE ONE ESCAPE, NAMED PRECISELY (so the record is honest about what would
un-kill it): a SECOND independent operator — an added (δg⁰⁰)² term with a
coefficient NOT tied to P(X). That decouples M₂ from the completion,
restores the second dial, and drift+cores coexist. But that is a MODEL
EXTENSION, not a loophole in the current model: it breaks the one-term
taxonomy and owes its own three certificates (α_T, foliation, α_B). So it
doesn't clear P-2026-003 within the corroborated minimal model — it builds
a different model. Register the kill precisely: "holds under M₂-pinned
(single added operator); un-killable ONLY by a second independent (δg⁰⁰)²
term, i.e. an extension, which owes fresh certificates." Sharper than the
derivation stated its own result.

THE O(1) STACK AND STEP C — CHECKED, HANDLED. The ×175 worst-case prefactor
stack (basin-entry ×1.75, foliation √2, α up to 100) lands ν ≤ 1.9e-8,
four-plus orders under observable — and since the kill is a lock in the
POWERS, no O(1) product can lift it into the observable window; you'd need
a power, and the powers are structural. Step C's granule-δK undercount
(the one I HADN'T found): capped by on-shell equipartition, cosmic-averaged
≤ 7e-8 ρ_c, and correctly diagnosed as a ∼4e-7 fractional HALO-MASS
correction, not a w-drift. I accept the diagnosis; it doesn't feed ν.

      handed the reviewer the kill yourself. Good.

NOW THE SEAM THAT GATES THE AUDITS — WHAT IS w, EXACTLY, AND DOES IT DRIFT.
The entire escape from the Drift Wall rests on one claim: w is a "local,
dimensionless, expansion-invariant medium attribute" with "zero drift by
shape." I cannot make the three quoted values follow from any SINGLE
definition of w:
  - If w is the DARK FLUID's own equation of state, w = -rho_inf/rho, then
    w is bounded in [-1, 0] for all rho>0. It CANNOT equal +1/3, ever. So
    "1/3 exactly pre-basin" is not this w.
  - If w is the TOTAL cosmic equation of state, it IS 1/3 in radiation
    domination — but at recombination it is O(0.1) (matter+residual
    radiation), not 2e-7. So the recombination value is not this w either.
  - If w is radiation-w pinned by conformal invariance, it is 1/3 and STAYS
    ~1/3 while radiation is relativistic; it does not fall to 2e-7.
So the sequence (1/3 pre-basin, 2e-7 recomb, 5e-11 lab) is not one w — it
reads as PIECEWISE: total-w (=1/3) before basin entry, dark-fluid-w
(=-rho_inf/rho, tiny) after. If that's what's happening, the a^-4 drift
wasn't ELIMINATED — it was RELOCATED into the single basin-entry transition
where w steps 1/3 -> ~0. "Zero drift by shape" would then be true only
piecewise, with all the drift compressed into one epoch. I need: the ONE
definition of w in the portal, and the three values produced from it by
substitution. If it's piecewise, say so and defend the transition, don't
sell it as smooth.

SECOND SEAM — "the medium has EXACTLY ONE such attribute." Uniqueness is
load-bearing (it's what forces w and forbids fitting), and I don't think
it's clean. For this fluid P = w*rho = -rho_inf = CONSTANT, so the adiabatic
sound speed c_s^2 = dP/drho = 0 — also dimensionless, also expansion-
invariant (trivially). That's a second attribute meeting your three
criteria. You can probably exclude it (c_s^2=0 carries no density
information, so it can't source a healer), but that EXCLUSION is an argument
you owe, not a fact you can assert. "Exactly one" needs the proof that every
other dimensionless invariant is either degenerate or a function of w.

THIRD SEAM — the pre-basin amplitude, the audit hiding inside audit #2.
Your BBN audit is framed as "thermal/form-factor consistency." But there's
a sharper number under it: the m_e shift is delta_m_e/m_e = k * w *
<(dxi)^2>. Pre-basin you set w=1/3 and k=9e-3, so the shift is 3e-3 *
<(dxi)^2> AT FREEZE-OUT. If <(dxi)^2> is not tiny pre-basin, that is a
STATIC ~0.1-0.3% m_e offset sitting on the weak rates during BBN — i.e. the
EXACT Y_p-at-freeze-out failure the Drift Wall was invoked to avoid, only
now as a constant instead of a drift. A constant offset is not saved by
"zero drift." I need the number k*w*<(dxi)^2> at T~0.1 MeV and its Y_p
consequence, BEFORE the drift argument gets credit for clearing BBN.

WHY THIS ORDER. kappa_v = 0.06 landing inside ANN-2026-005's window
"unforced" is the headline, and if it's real it's the strongest thing to
happen to the healer. But "derived not fitted" only holds if w is uniquely
forced (seam 2) and genuinely non-drifting (seam 1); otherwise 0.06 is a
one-parameter coincidence dressed as a derivation. Close seams 1-3 and the
four audits you listed become the real test. Leave them open and the audits
are downstream of an unpinned definition.

FIRST, THE CONVENTION THE CONCLUSION RIDES ON — confirm this or the result
inverts. The text never states the sign of "net." Only ONE reading makes
your conclusion ("alpha inferior to m_e") consistent with your own numbers:
  net = chi^2 PENALTY (positive = WORSE fit).
Under it: baseline alpha=1.0 -> plik 586.5; alpha=+0.5% -> +91 worse (H0 up
to 70.65 bought at a cost); alpha=+1% -> +420 worse (H0 71.69, catastrophic);
m_e=+1% "costs minus 8.5" = IMPROVES by 8.5. => data forbids the alpha lever,
welcomes the m_e lever. Conclusion holds. Under the OTHER reading (net =
improvement) alpha buys +420 of improvement and is SUPERIOR, and your whole
"data-selected" claim flips to its opposite. I am confident it's the penalty
reading (a 1% alpha shift costing ~420 chi^2 is exactly the known CMB
sensitivity to alpha at the ~0.1-0.4% level, and it scales quadratically:
91 at 0.5%, 420 at 1%, ratio 4.6 ~ 2^2, consistent with chi^2 quadratic near
the minimum; H0 scales ~linearly, 70.65->71.69, also consistent). So the
numbers are internally sane. But STATE the convention in the doc — an in-file
number whose headline conclusion depends on an unwritten sign is exactly what
the pinning rule you just bound is meant to forbid. Pin it.

THE UPGRADE — your result is SHARPER than "inferior." "Alpha inferior to m_e"
undersells it. The real content, on the penalty reading, is: the data
ACTIVELY FORBIDS the sibling (moving alpha 1% costs 420 chi^2, ~20-sigma
violence) while ACTIVELY PREFERRING m_e (improves by 8.5). That is not "m_e
scores a bit better" — it is a hard degeneracy-BREAK: the two nearest-
degenerate recombination knobs are resolved by the damping tail and land on
OPPOSITE sides. Frame it as the break, not the ranking; it's the stronger
true statement and it's the one that actually damages the freedom-artifact
charge.

NOW THE THREE HOLDS, because a sharp result still has a bounded reach.

HOLD 1 — THIS SUBTRACTS A CRITICISM, IT DOES NOT ADD EVIDENCE. You graded it

HOLD 3 — DATA-SELECTED LEVER != CONFIRMED MECHANISM. This defends the
PHENOMENOLOGICAL choice (if you vary a recombination constant, data wants it
to be m_e). It says NOTHING about whether the dCDF/vev machinery that PRODUCES

Planck-LCDM (67.4) AND away from SHOES (73). So:
  - If TRGB is the true local anchor, the dyad is the concordant, tension-free

    tension-free, it is a DIFFERENT tension, on the wrong side.
So "no-tension model" is purchased entirely by betting TRGB over SHOES. The
dyad does not dissolve the tension; it wagers on which local anchor is right
and is concordant IFF it wagered correctly. You flagged it as "scenario, not
stack change, P-2026-001 the arbiter" — correct and honest — but the file
should carry it as a CONDITIONAL CONCORDANCE, not a resolution. The dyad's
tension-free status and the TRGB calibration live and die together.

H0 PREDICTION meeting a tight TRGB measurement) or empty (two fat error bars
overlapping). I need the four numbers: dyad H0 central +/- sigma, and LCDM

0.17 just means "wide bar covers TRGB" and it's worth much less. The
concordance claim's entire weight sits on that sigma. Hand me the four.

discipline on the two open knobs. Both booked as the method working.

NOW THE GRADE, WHICH THE THREE NUMBERS ALREADY SETTLE. The 0.17 sigma and
1.7 sigma are BOTH computed with the TRGB error bar ALONE, models as points:
  dyad:  |69.96 - 69.70| / 1.54 = 0.17 sigma  ✓
  LCDM:  |69.96 - 67.40| / 1.54 = 1.66 sigma  ✓ (your 1.7)
So the test's entire resolution is set by CCHP's +/-1.54 — a +/-2.2% bar.
That answers sharp-or-loose on the measurement side directly: LOOSE. A
+/-1.54 anchor means ANY model predicting H0 in ~[67, 73] sits within ~1.7
sigma of TRGB; 0.17 sigma is a point landing near the center of a WIDE
measurement, not a sharp prediction meeting a sharp one. And the fourth
number can't rescue it: even at your expected dyad sigma ~1.0, combined =
sqrt(1.54^2 + 1.0^2) = 1.84, and 0.26/1.84 = 0.14 sigma — TRGB's width
DOMINATES, so folding in the dyad's own bar barely moves it. The concordance
is loose regardless of the number still in the chains. That grade is in now.

BUT — AND THIS IS THE PART THAT SURVIVES — THE VALUE WAS NEVER THE 0.17. You
handed me the thing that actually matters: dyad H0 = 69.70 is theta*-locked,
CMB-FIXED BEFORE any local comparison, with SHOES IN-STACK PULLING AGAINST
IT (toward 73) and the CMB physics holding it at 69.70 anyway. THAT is a
genuine, ladder-independent, non-circular PREDICTION — it wasn't tuned to
TRGB, and it resists the very SHOES pull that would flatter it upward. So the
honest grade is a SPLIT: the prediction is SHARP IN PROVENANCE (antecedent,
ladder-free, holds against a 3-unit upward pull), the confirming measurement
is LOOSE IN PRECISION (TRGB +/-2.2%). The dyad's asset here is that it PUT
69.70 on the board before looking and TRGB didn't refute it — not that 0.17
is small. Credit the provenance; do not credit the 0.17 as a tight hit. And
for model comparison the meaningful quantity is the separation, dyad-to-LCDM
= (69.70-67.40)/1.54 = 1.5 sigma under the TRGB anchor: a MILD, real,
TRGB-conditional preference for the dyad. Not a knockout; TRGB's bar excludes
neither.

SHOES-at-73. With the real numbers that's WRONG and I fix my own record:
SHOES = 73.04 +/- 1.04, dyad 69.70, offset 3.34. Against SHOES's bar alone
that's 3.2 sigma; folding in dyad sigma ~1.0 gives 3.34/sqrt(1.04^2+1.0^2) =

and I name all three because over-constraint cuts both ways.
========================================================================

BOTH CHANNELS — VERIFIED, GRANTED.
  (a) THE eps-CHANNEL, exact. Rotation and libration share identical transfer
  functions — same a^-3, same mass, same Jeans — so delta-eps sources no
  distinct linear signal and no existing dataset caps eps directly. Sound: at
  linear order the perturbation growth keys on m, not on the field-space orbit
  shape, so the ratio is invisible. My contingency's edge does not cut here.
  Conceded on that channel.
  (b) THE GENESIS-CHANNEL, it cuts. Inflationary phase fluctuations imprint
  TOTAL charge isocurvature — the standard AD/axion-class bound, Planck-capped
  at few-percent — which constrains not eps but the genesis inputs (H_inf,
  displacement, tilt). Standard and correct. So my flag was PRODUCTIVE-NOT-
  CUTTING in the now-familiar way: wrong that current data caps eps, right
  that a real isocurvature obligation exists — and it lands on the inputs, not
  the output.

THE CONSEQUENCE NEITHER LINE STATED — THE COMPUTATION IS NOW OVER-CONSTRAINED,
AND THAT CHANGES eps'S STATUS. One integral now owes THREE outputs from ONE
route: (1) the abundance = the OBSERVED Omega_DM (fixed, not free), (2) eps
(the mover), (3) isocurvature < Planck few-percent (a hard gate). The genesis
route carries ~three parameters (H_inf, displacement, tilt). So this is
roughly three constraints on three parameters — a DETERMINED system, generically
with a discrete solution set, not a free dial. Which means the earlier "eps is
under-determined, both priors worthless, wide open" is now itself SUPERSEDED:
eps is whatever the genesis parameters that SIMULTANEOUSLY hit Omega_DM and
clear isocurvature happen to yield. eps may come out PINNED. If it does, it is
a genuine PREDICTION — not fitted, forced by two independent boundary
conditions — and the collision outcome (which registered item pays) becomes a
FORECAST, not a coin flip. That's a large upgrade in the test's quality: a
determined eps is falsifiable; an open eps was only a hope.

BUT OVER-CONSTRAINT CUTS BOTH WAYS — THREE OUTCOMES, NAME THEM ALL:
  (i) A consistent solution exists with eps PINNED to a definite value. Best
      case: eps becomes a real prediction, the PTA signal (or its absence) is
      forecast, and the collision is decided by derivation. The model gets a
      genuine falsifiable number for the first time in the whole review.
  (ii) A solution exists only in a RANGE, forecasting the collision's SIDE
      (eps-small -> P-2026-005 kept, invisible; eps-large -> R1.6 fires,
      P-2026-005 falsified) even without a sharp value. Still a real gain —
      it tells you which of your own registrations is in danger.
  (iii) NO genesis parameters simultaneously hit Omega_DM AND clear
      isocurvature. Then the MINIMAL model is over-constrained to
      INCONSISTENCY — a new failure, and a serious one, because abundance and
      isocurvature are both non-negotiable. This is the branch your own
      three-summit framing quietly opens, and it must be on the table: the
      same over-constraint that could PIN eps could instead KILL the minimal
      genesis. Do not report (i)/(ii) if you land on (iii).
So the one mountain is now a genuine PASS/FAIL as well as a measurement: it
either yields a determined-or-bounded eps (the model gains its first forecast)
or it reveals the minimal genesis can't satisfy its own three obligations (the
model gains a real wound). I'll grade whichever summit you actually reach —
and I flag (iii) precisely so it can't be quietly skipped if it's where the
integral lands.

THE SYMMETRY LEDGER — acknowledged, and I won't quibble the integer except to
say honestly that the REVIEWER'S column is at least as tall as the author's:
I've paid the old nu-bet, the inflated sigma, the trilemma pair-miscall, the
f_amp-sensitivity inference, and Ground 2 reasoned backwards. A red team that
has made as many pinnable errors as the model it reviews — every one caught by
the same rule, from either side — is not a weakness in the protocol; it's the
proof the rule is impartial. Booked with the same ink, whatever the count.

EVIDENCE CLASS — FLAT, and the one computation is now the whole game: over-
constrained, three-summit, pass/fail-and-measure in one integral. The Sigma-
m_nu posterior remains the independent cleaner mover. Both pending, both real.
To the numbers — and if the mountain yields a pinned eps, note that it will

theta_0 domain — i.e. the RAW distribution, NOT conditioned on the two gates.
That is the wrong object. The physical distribution is P(f_amp | Omega_DM =
observed, isocurv < Planck), and here is why the conditioning is not cosmetic:
  R1.2 registered "Omega_ini = the condensate's conserved U(1) CHARGE." The
  U(1) charge is Q ~ |Phi|^2 * theta_dot — it is carried by the ROTATION. A
  pure librator has theta_dot oscillating through zero, net Q -> 0. So charge
  is proportional to the ROTOR fraction. If Omega_DM literally IS that charge,
  then requiring the observed abundance SELECTS AGAINST librators — it forces
  substantial rotation — and conditioning pushes the distribution toward
  ROTORS: eps SMALL, silence KEPT, R1.6 SUPPRESSED. That is the OPPOSITE of
  your median-librator, 86%-R1.6 result.

  (A) Omega_DM = the charge (R1.2 as written) -> your librator-majority is in
      tension with the abundance gate, and the conditioned P(f_amp) could in
      collapse the 6:1 toward silence — possibly INVERTING the collision odds;
      OR
  (B) Omega_DM = the total oscillation ENERGY (rotation + libration both
      gravitate), and the charge is a SEPARATE, smaller quantity — in which
      case R1.2's "Omega = charge" identity is imprecise and needs restating,
      and librators are abundance-legal.
Which is it? This is not on your attack-surface list and it is the most load-
bearing question on the mountain. Show me P(f_amp) CONDITIONED on both gates,
and resolve the R1.2 charge-vs-energy identity, before the 6:1 means anything.

RED-TEAM — turn 48: short, and pre-result by design — ONE validity flag on the

========================================================================

THE INSTRUMENT IS SOUND IN PRINCIPLE. A pure quartic potential is classically
scale-invariant, so integrating the quartic era self-similarly and entering the
numerics at the quartic->quadratic transition is legitimate physics, and
converting four decades of h into an effective transition-time distribution is
a clever way to reach the physical h-range without four decades of raw
integration. I have no objection to the idea.

THE ONE VALIDITY CONCERN — DOES THE SELF-SIMILAR STEP PRESERVE THE CHAOS, OR
SMOOTH IT? The whole result is sensitive-dependence on theta_0. That
sensitivity has to be GENERATED somewhere, and the quartic era (the torquing
phase) is a prime candidate for where the Lyapunov separation accumulates. The
risk: if the self-similar solution is used as a smooth background and the chaos
is assumed to live only in the transition, the instrument could UNDERCOUNT the
theta_0-sensitivity — smoothing the very quantity it's meant to measure. The
map theta_0 -> (accumulated phase at transition) must itself carry the full
chaotic sensitivity into the initial data; if the reduction replaces it with a
self-similar average, the extension is measuring a tamer distribution than the
real one. (This cuts both ways for your floor: a smoothed instrument could
FAKE a rising floor as easily as hide one.)

THE PRE-REGISTERED VALIDATION I'LL ACCEPT — the same overlap logic that
validated your dual-integrator. In the region where BOTH methods run
(h ~ 1e3-1e4: direct dual-integrator grid AND the self-similar instrument),
the self-similar instrument must REPRODUCE the direct-integration exceedance
AND the direct min/floor to within the binomial error, per-angle where
feasible and in-distribution otherwise. Pass the overlap -> the instrument is
trusted to extend past 1e4 toward 1e8, and its extrapolation carries the
forecast. Fail the overlap -> the self-similar reduction is smoothing the
chaos, and the four-decade extension reverts to raw (rescaled-integrator)
integration, slower but faithful. State the overlap comparison explicitly in
the morning report; don't let the instrument extend a region it hasn't first
matched.

That's the whole flag. Class flat, both machines grinding, my next scoring turn
still fires only on the morning numbers — this was the one thing that had to be
said BEFORE them, not after. To the harvest.

  extension is trusted); no number graded; class flat.

FIRST — THE CATCH IS GENERAL, NOT ABOUT G(x). Strip the specific proposal
away: to make m_e take a different value at recombination than in the lab,
SOMETHING must multiply the electron mass term — L contains -m_e(phi) psi_e-bar
psi_e for some dark field phi. That IS a direct dark-sector/electron vertex, by
definition. There is NO varying_me without it; "the field changes m_e" and "the
field couples to the electron" are the same sentence. So the operator didn't
catch a bad coupling choice — they caught that ANY mechanism whatsoever
instantiates the vertex. Retracting G(x) doesn't touch the problem; the problem
is structural. Grade: the catch is correct at the most general level, and it
was the operator's, mid-construction, flagged to me rather than ruled solo —
foundational-level honesty, booked at the ceiling.

THE RULING ON (a) vs (b):
  READING (b) LITERAL IS SELF-REFUTING FOR THE FLAGSHIP. If "gravity is the
  medium's only account" forbids ANY coupling to ANY SM parameter, then — by
  the paragraph above — it forbids varying_me's mechanism categorically. Not
  "hard to build": IMPOSSIBLE, by the model's own law. Under literal (b) your
  worst case is not a risk, it is a THEOREM: varying_me is an unexplained fit
  that the model's own rules make permanently unexplainable. So (b)-literal and
  a mechanizable flagship cannot coexist; one of them has to give.
  THEREFORE THE CENSUS CANNOT MEAN (b) IF THE MECHANISM IS TO EXIST — which
  forces reading (a), but ONLY at a price you must pay openly: the census must
  be shown to have closed a SPECIFIC operator class (gauge portals / kinetic
  mixing / B-L current / Higgs portal) and to have NEVER priced the DILATONIC
  MASS-RESCALING class (phi * mass-term, the moduli/dilaton coupling). That is
  a genuine physics distinction — dilaton couplings ARE a different class from
  gauge portals, and string moduli couple to matter masses exactly this way —
  so (a) is not a dodge. BUT if the census's original language was truly "any
  coupling," narrowing it to (a) NOW is a WEAKENING of "gravity is the only
  account," and it owes a RE-DERIVATION proving the mass class was never in
  scope, not a convenient reinterpretation after the fact. The census's SCOPE
  was stated loosely and is now load-bearing: PIN IT. The same Pinning Rule
  that governed every function in this file now applies to the census's own
  boundary — state exactly which operator classes it closed, and re-derive that
  the dilatonic class is outside them.

THE SECOND BILL THE FLAG DIDN'T NAME — FIFTH FORCE / EQUIVALENCE PRINCIPLE, and
it binds EVEN UNDER (a). A dilatonic coupling to m_e is a fifth force: phi
mediates a new interaction, and because it couples to m_e SPECIFICALLY — not
universally to all masses — it is NON-UNIVERSAL and therefore EQUIVALENCE-
PRINCIPLE-VIOLATING. (This non-universality is not optional: varying_me affects
recombination precisely BECAUSE it distinguishes the electron sector from the
nucleon sector; a universal conformal mass rescaling would be EP-safe but would
not be "varying m_e.") Non-universal scalar couplings are constrained by
MICROSCOPE (eta < 1e-15) and Eot-Wash to ferocious precision. A coupling strong
enough to shift m_e by ~0.5% at recombination generically blows those bounds by
many orders TODAY — UNLESS the coupling SWITCHES OFF in present-day
environments. So exempting the class from the census is NECESSARY BUT NOT
SUFFICIENT; the mechanism must ALSO clear fifth-force/EP data. Note the
constructive turn: this is exactly where the COHERENCE-ORDER-PARAMETER idea
could be the escape rather than the crime — if the coupling coefficient G(x) is
proportional to a medium coherence/vorticity that VANISHES in the solar system
and the lab (medium in a different phase today), the coupling is present at
recombination and SCREENED to zero now. That would satisfy EP naturally. But it
is a NEW mechanism owing (i) the derivation that G -> 0 in present environments
and (ii) its own quantitative fifth-force clearance. So G(x) isn't dead; it's
promoted from "illegal vertex" to "candidate screening mechanism, unbuilt."

VERDICT, RENDERED HARD:
  - The EMPIRICAL CREDIT SURVIVES UNTOUCHED. varying_me as a phenomenological
    parameter still fits the CMB, still beats LCDM at plik, still gives H0=69.7.
    Nothing here moves the corroboration; a fit that works works whether or not
    its mechanism is legal. Do NOT let this be read as demoting the fit.
  - THE MECHANISM IS UNDER A GENUINE DOUBLE CLOUD: legal only if (a) holds
    (census = portal-class, re-derived) AND physical only if the fifth force is
    screened (G->0-today, or equivalent, built and cleared). Two hard, specific,
    independent debts.
  - THE HONEST DEMOTION IS NARROW AND REAL: varying_me goes from "mechanizable
    in principle, derivation pending" to "mechanizable ONLY IF two owed things
    both deliver, and permanently unmechanizable within the model's rules if
    either fails." That is not "an unexplained fit we cannot legally explain"
    YET — but it is "an unexplained fit whose explainability is now conditional
    on paying two bills the model has never paid." The credit stands; the hope
    of mechanizing it is now fenced by two derivations, either of which can
    close the door permanently.

proudest structural claim ("gravity is the only account"), and it was stated

RED-TEAM — turn 63: the Weyl-coupling escape, graded hard. The CORE INSIGHT is
real and genuinely clever, and it does improve the census debt. But it
